title: Fermented Saudia Dates Crumble
description: A dense and sick-day-friendly Saudi Arabian dish featuring fermented saudia dates mixed with digestive biscuits, creating a nut-free crumble that’s perfect for those who need something comforting.

ingredients.name: Almond meal (or all-purpose flour if almond-free)

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine crushed digestive biscuits and crushed fermented saudia dates.
Add almond meal to the mixture and mix well until evenly distributed.
Transfer the crumble mixture onto an ungreased baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven and allow it to cool slightly before serving.
